entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R Br., the crop studied for genetic diversity and heterosis prediction

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat markers used for genetic divergence and heterosis prediction

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphism markers used for genetic divergence and heterosis prediction

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERGENCE
entities.description: The degree of difference in genetic makeup between individuals or populations

entities.name: HETEROSIS PREDICTION
entities.description: The process of predicting the superior performance of hybrid offspring compared to parents

entities.name: CLUSTERING
entities.description: Analysis used to partition lines into groups based on markers

entities.name: STRUCTURE ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to partition lines into groups based on markers

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF MOLECULAR VARIANCE
entities.description: Statistical method to analyze genetic diversity between groups

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COORDINATE ANALYSIS
entities.description: Dimensionality reduction method to visualize genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC DISTANCE
entities.description: A measure of genetic difference between two individuals or populations

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, used to evaluate heterosis

entities.name: BETTER PARENT HETEROSIS
entities.description: The difference between the hybrid performance and the performance of the better parent

entities.name: GERMPLASM CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of identifying and describing the genetic makeup of a collection of plant genetic resources

entities.name: HALF DIALLEL CROSSING
entities.description: A breeding design where each parent is crossed with every other parent once

entities.name: MAINTAINER LINES
entities.description: B lines used in hybrid seed production

entities.name: RESTORER LINES
entities.description: R lines used in hybrid seed production

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism

entities.description: Two unspecified locations where hybrids were evaluated for grain yield
